Congruence: Does the goal build logically on the gaps/problems/motivations? The preceding text mentions issues: concurrency, new virtual threads, need to evaluate old and new mechanisms. The goal: determine usage perspectives of virtual threads in context of other Java parallel features. That aligns with the motivation: evaluate new and old concurrency mechanisms. So yes, it builds logically. All aspects mentioned in goal should be also mentioned in preceding text: "virtual threads" is mentioned, "Java parallel features" is mentioned. So compliance: true.

Thus all four compliance true. Provide feedback accordingly.
